description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow with read-only repository permissions. The workflow triggers on a schedule (daily at 3:23 AM UTC), on push to .github/workflows/nightly.yml, and on workflow dispatch. It runs multiple jobs with different configurations for sanitizer, cross-compilation, clang-tidy, valgrind, hybrid TLS interop, and TLS-Anvil server tests on various platforms like Ubuntu and Windows.
